# Employees

Introductory content about all Employee domain. What is an employee?

A human paid wages.

## 🪝 Hooks

<DocCardList items={[{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-bank-form","label":"✍️ useBankForm","description":"Headless React Hook Form hook for creating an employee bank account."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-child-support-garnishment-form","label":"✍️ useChildSupportGarnishmentForm","description":"Headless hook for creating or updating a child-support garnishment."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-compensation-form","label":"✍️ useCompensationForm","description":"Headless hook for creating or updating a compensation row on a job — FLSA classification, pay rate, payment unit, effective date, and optional minimum-wage adjustment."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-deduction-form","label":"✍️ useDeductionForm","description":"Headless hook for creating or updating a non-child-support deduction."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-employee-details-form","label":"✍️ useEmployeeDetailsForm","description":"Headless hook for creating or updating an employee's profile details — name, email, SSN, date of birth, and self-onboarding preference."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-employee-list","label":"🌐 useEmployeeList","description":"Fetches a paginated list of a company's employees and decorates each entry with the actions allowed for its current onboarding state."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-employee-state-taxes-form","label":"✍️ useEmployeeStateTaxesForm","description":"Headless form hook for updating an employee's state tax withholding answers. The set of questions is driven by the API response per state, so `form.Fields` is an array of state groups with discriminated, render-ready `Field` components rather than a fixed named object."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-federal-taxes-form","label":"✍️ useFederalTaxesForm","description":"Headless hook for updating an employee's federal tax (W-4) withholding information — filing status, multiple-jobs flag, dependents, other income, deductions, and extra withholding."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-home-address-form","label":"✍️ useHomeAddressForm","description":"Form hook for creating or editing an employee's home address."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-job-form","label":"✍️ useJobForm","description":"Headless hook for creating or updating an employee's job — title, hire date, S-Corp 2% shareholder flag, and Washington state workers' compensation fields."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-payment-method-form","label":"✍️ usePaymentMethodForm","description":"Headless React Hook Form hook for updating an employee's payment method."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-sign-employee-form","label":"✍️ useSignEmployeeForm","description":"Headless hook for signing an employee form — captures a typed signature, electronic consent, and (for I-9 forms) preparer/translator certification."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-split-payments-form","label":"✍️ useSplitPaymentsForm","description":"Headless React Hook Form hook for splitting an employee's Direct Deposit across multiple bank accounts."},{"type":"link","href":"hooks/use-work-address-form","label":"✍️ useWorkAddressForm","description":"Form hook for creating or editing an employee's work address."}]} />
